name: Annunciation Catholic Church
description: Come play pickleball at Annunciation Catholic Church in Havelock, NC! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Carolina Colours
description: Carolina Colours is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Bern, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are private.
open_play_schedule: Private courts for the use of home owners in Carolina Colours or their invited and accompanied guests.  Bathrooms available for residents behind key fob operated doors.

name: Cottle Park
description: Cottle Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Trent Woods, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Cottle Park Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Cottle Park Pickleball in Trent Woods, NC! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Creekside Park

name: Fairfield Harbour

name: First Presbyterian Church
description: First Presbyterian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Bern, NC. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Havelock Parks And Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Havelock Parks And Recreation in Havelock, NC! There are 7 acrylic courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, and water.

name: Stanley White Recreation Center
description: Inside courts in a basketball gym.  Portable nets.  Facility to open 1/24/2025.  Hours available to be provided

name: Town Creek Park
description: Come play pickleball at Town Creek Park in New Bern, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

description: Twin Rivers YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Bern, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and lights. A membership is required to play.
